metadata.description: The display name of the workbook.
The unique ID for the workbook.
The name of the Log Analytics workspace.
The resource group of the Log Analytics workspace.
The subscription ID of the Log Analytics workspace.

properties.serializedData:
{"version":"Notebook/1.0","items":[{"type":1,"content":{"json":"# 🔍 SOC Incident Investigation Helper
---
Parameter-driven investigation workbook. Enter a user UPN or device name to get a unified cross-table timeline of all activity for that entity. Designed for incident response — one workbook, one entity, full picture."},"name":"title"},{"type":9,"content":{"version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","parameters":[{"id":"timeRange","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"TimeRange","type":4,"isRequired":true,"value":{"durationMs":604800000},"typeSettings":{"selectableValues":[{"durationMs":86400000},{"durationMs":259200000},{"durationMs":604800000},{"durationMs":2592000000}],"allowCustom":true},"label":"Time Range"},{"id":"upnParam","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"UserUPN","type":1,"isRequired":false,"value":"","label":"User UPN","typeSettings":{"placeholderText":"user@domain.com"}},{"id":"deviceParam","version":"KqlParameterItem/1.0","name":"DeviceName","type":1,"isRequired":false,"value":"","label":"Device Name","typeSettings":{"placeholderText":"hostname or FQDN"}}],"style":"pills","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces"},"name":"parameters"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"> **How to use:** Enter a **User UPN** to investigate user-centric activity (sign-ins, alerts, Office 365, audit logs). Enter a **Device Name** to investigate device-centric activity (process execution, network connections, logons). Enter both to correlate user and device activity together."},"name":"instructions"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🚨 Alerts for Entity"},"name":"alerts-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SecurityAlert
| where (isempty('{UserUPN}') or tolower(CompromisedEntity) contains tolower('{UserUPN}') or tolower(Entities) contains tolower('{UserUPN}'))
    or (isempty('{DeviceName}') or tolower(CompromisedEntity) contains tolower('{DeviceName}') or tolower(Entities) contains tolower('{DeviceName}'))
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}') or isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| project TimeGenerated, AlertName, AlertSeverity, CompromisedEntity, ProductName, Tactics, Description
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Security alerts involving this entity","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"AlertSeverity","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-alerts"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🔑 Sign-In Activity"},"name":"signin-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"SigninLogs
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}')
| where tolower(UserPrincipalName) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
| project TimeGenerated, UserPrincipalName, AppDisplayName, IPAddress, Location, ResultType, ResultDescription, RiskLevelDuringSignIn, ClientAppUsed, ConditionalAccessStatus
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100","size":0,"title":"Sign-in logs for user","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"ResultType","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"0","representation":"success","text":"Success"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"error","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"RiskLevelDuringSignIn","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"high","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-signins"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📋 Entra Audit Activity"},"name":"audit-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"AuditLogs
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}')
| extend InitiatedByUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(InitiatedBy)).user.userPrincipalName)
| extend TargetUPN = tostring(parse_json(tostring(TargetResources))[0].userPrincipalName)
| where tolower(InitiatedByUPN) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
    or tolower(TargetUPN) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
| project TimeGenerated, OperationName, InitiatedByUPN, TargetUPN, Result, LoggedByService
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 50","size":0,"title":"Entra audit events — initiated by or targeting this user","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-audit"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"OfficeActivity
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}')
| where tolower(UserId) contains tolower('{UserUPN}')
| summarize EventCount = count() by Operation, OfficeWorkload
| sort by EventCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Office 365 activity summary for user","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"EventCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"blue","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"50","name":"table-office"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 🖥️ Device Logons"},"name":"device-logon-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceLogonEvents
| where isnotempty('{UserUPN}') or isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| where (isnotempty('{UserUPN}') and tolower(AccountName) contains tolower(split('{UserUPN}', '@')[0]))
    or (isnotempty('{DeviceName}') and tolower(DeviceName) contains tolower('{DeviceName}'))
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, AccountDomain, LogonType, ActionType, RemoteIP, RemoteDeviceName, IsLocalAdmin
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100","size":0,"title":"Device logon events","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"IsLocalAdmin","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"true","representation":"critical","text":"Admin"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"User"}]}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-device-logons"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## ⚙️ Process Execution on Device"},"name":"process-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceProcessEvents
| where isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| where tolower(DeviceName) contains tolower('{DeviceName}')
| project TimeGenerated, DeviceName, AccountName, FileName, ProcessCommandLine, InitiatingProcessFileName, InitiatingProcessCommandLine
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 100","size":0,"title":"Process execution on device","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"60","name":"table-processes"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"DeviceNetworkEvents
| where isnotempty('{DeviceName}')
| where tolower(DeviceName) contains tolower('{DeviceName}')
| where ActionType == 'ConnectionSuccess'
| where RemoteIPType == 'Public'
| summarize ConnectionCount = count() by RemoteIP, RemotePort, InitiatingProcessFileName
| sort by ConnectionCount desc
| take 20","size":0,"title":"Network connections from device","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"ConnectionCount","formatter":4,"formatOptions":{"palette":"redGreen","max":100}}],"filter":true}},"customWidth":"40","name":"table-network"},{"type":1,"content":{"json":"## 📅 Unified Timeline"},"name":"timeline-header"},{"type":3,"content":{"version":"KqlItem/1.0","query":"let UPN = tolower('{UserUPN}');
let Device = tolower('{DeviceName}');
let AlertEvents = SecurityAlert
| where (isnotempty(UPN) and tolower(CompromisedEntity) contains UPN)
    or (isnotempty(Device) and tolower(CompromisedEntity) contains Device)
| project TimeGenerated, EventType = 'Alert', Entity = CompromisedEntity, Detail = AlertName, Severity = AlertSeverity;
let SigninEvents = SigninLogs
| where isnotempty(UPN) and tolower(UserPrincipalName) contains UPN
| project TimeGenerated, EventType = 'SignIn', Entity = UserPrincipalName, Detail = strcat(AppDisplayName, ' - ', iff(ResultType == '0', 'Success', strcat('Failed (', ResultType, ')'))), Severity = iff(RiskLevelDuringSignIn in ('high','medium'), RiskLevelDuringSignIn, 'low');
let LogonEvents = DeviceLogonEvents
| where (isnotempty(UPN) and tolower(AccountName) contains tolower(split(UPN, '@')[0]))
    or (isnotempty(Device) and tolower(DeviceName) contains Device)
| where ActionType == 'LogonSuccess'
| project TimeGenerated, EventType = 'DeviceLogon', Entity = DeviceName, Detail = strcat(AccountName, ' - ', LogonType), Severity = iff(IsLocalAdmin == true, 'high', 'low');
let AlertEventsFiltered = AlertEvents | where isnotempty(UPN) or isnotempty(Device);
let SigninEventsFiltered = SigninEvents | where isnotempty(UPN);
let LogonEventsFiltered = LogonEvents | where isnotempty(UPN) or isnotempty(Device);
union AlertEventsFiltered, SigninEventsFiltered, LogonEventsFiltered
| sort by TimeGenerated desc
| take 200","size":0,"title":"Unified event timeline — alerts, sign-ins, and device logons","timeContext":{"durationMs":0},"timeContextFromParameter":"TimeRange","queryType":0,"resourceType":"microsoft.operationalinsights/workspaces","visualization":"table","gridSettings":{"formatters":[{"columnMatch":"TimeGenerated","formatter":6},{"columnMatch":"EventType","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"colors","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Alert","representation":"redBright","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"SignIn","representation":"blue","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"DeviceLogon","representation":"green","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"gray","text":"{0}{1}"}]}},{"columnMatch":"Severity","formatter":18,"formatOptions":{"thresholdsOptions":"icons","thresholdsGrid":[{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"High","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"high","representation":"critical","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"Medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"==","thresholdValue":"medium","representation":"warning","text":"{0}{1}"},{"operator":"Default","thresholdValue":null,"representation":"success","text":"{0}{1}"}]}}],"filter":true,"sortBy":[{"itemKey":"TimeGenerated","sortOrder":2}]}},"customWidth":"100","name":"table-timeline"}],"styleSettings":{},"fromTemplateId":"","$schema":"https://github.com/Microsoft/Application-Insights-Workbooks/blob/master/schema/workbook.json"}
